who: HR teams in small to medium-sized law firms using BambooHR, processing 5–15 employee policy updates/month
offer: For HR teams in small to medium-sized law firms using BambooHR, processing 5–15 employee policy updates/month, manual tracking causes missed compliance deadlines. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking.
problem: Staying updated with compliance changes and deadlines
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR teams seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about compliance tools
DM outreach to HR teams with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for HR professionals
try_it: Let users try Email notifications and Deadline reminders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as easy-to-use templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing compliance data
Enable one-click export for simple reports
